results.sql:
CREATE TABLE jobs (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    job_number TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    job_title TEXT NOT NULL,
    print_method TEXT,
    spot_colours INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'active',
    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
    updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
  , press_id INTEGER, setup_start_at TEXT, first_pull_at TEXT, prod_start_at TEXT, prev_units INTEGER DEFAULT 8, curr_units INTEGER DEFAULT 8, actual_stops INTEGER, actual_waste INTEGER, target_units INTEGER DEFAULT 0, job_state TEXT DEFAULT 'ready', production_start_at TEXT, completed_at TEXT, color_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, has_white INTEGER DEFAULT 0, has_cmyk INTEGER DEFAULT 1, has_varnish INTEGER DEFAULT 0, print_units INTEGER DEFAULT 0, setup_target_min INTEGER DEFAULT 0, admin_pull_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, admin_waste_m INTEGER DEFAULT 0, admin_out INTEGER DEFAULT 0, admin_done INTEGER DEFAULT 0, admin_start_at TEXT)
